name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan represents a fundamental shift in methodology: it replaces a Random Forest classifier with a multi-task neural network, changes the data preprocessing pipeline (iterative imputation vs. simple imputation), and adopts a completely different approach to uncertainty and sensitivity analysis (Monte Carlo vs. SHAP/leave-one-metal-out). Because the core modeling architecture and analytical framework are entirely different, no steps from the old plan can be reused.
